misc.title: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1175 : LUFFY F*CKS UP SOMMERS SCENE - ENGLISH TRANSLATION⚠️ (The hostage children and their parents/relatives have now been dropped off by Loki in the Western Village, where Jarul and the
misc.text: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1175 : LUFFY F*CKS UP SOMMERS SCENE - ENGLISH TRANSLATION⚠️ (The hostage children and their parents/relatives have now been dropped off by Loki in the Western Village, where Jarul and the defending giants are fending off the giants influenced by the Domi Reversi.) Giant: Loki! It’s dangerous in this village! Get the kids to a safer place! Loki: Like I care! I just shook them off—they just rode onto my back on their own anyway! Now, all of you, get off me already!!! (Jarul then makes an announcement to all of Elbaph) Jarul: Announcement to all of Elbaph! The children are all safe! There are no more “hostages”!!! Nami: Thank goodness!!! Giants: Alright!!! (Luffy sees Zoro in the Western Village) Luffy: Ah! That’s Zoro!!! HEEEY!!! Zoro: You guys are late!!! That dragon… don’t tell me… Luffy: Yeah, it’s Loki! Seeing that you’re here, I guess this place is safe! Zoro: Since you’ve become a giant now, go ahead and crush those monsters that came out of dreams! They’re wreaking havoc all over Elbaph right now! Luffy: Got it!!! --- Hm? (Some projectiles came flying towards the injured parents/relatives.) Luffy: Something came flying down! Oimo: It’s “thorns”!!! Get the children inside the buildings! Sommers: It’s no use, you bastards! Road: That guy followed us?! (Sommers appears and is seen riding on three large intertwined thorns which forms into a three headed snake.) Sommers: There’s no way you guys should be alive, you bunch of trash! Give me back my “emotions”!!! Although… this might actually be convenient!! If you brats are still alive, then this isn’t a failure for me!! Just as planned, you’re all coming to the Holy Land!! —However… I’ll deliver the finishing blow to your dying parents!! With these multi-barreled “THORN LAUNCHERS”* (Sommers' three headed thorn snake opens their mouths and reveals cannon-like protrusions.) (TL NOTE: in Japanese, Sommers calls this technique “IBARANCHA”—a combination of ibara meaning “thorn” and rancha, the Japanese pronunciation of “launcher”) Colon: I… won’t let you do that!!! This time, I will protect Mother!!! Child: Me too!! Child: Me too!! (All of the children are now shielding their parents/relatives) Sommers: You’re making me cry!!! This is the best, you guys!!! To the point that I don’t even care about the mission anymore!!! Who should I k*ll to make this truly moving?! I’ll never forget your brave and stupid faces!!! Farewell!!! (the thorn snakes fires a barrage of thorns from their mouths.) Ripley: Run away, Colon, please! Colon: No way! I’ll protect you, Mother! (Zoro comes to the rescue and parries all the thorns with his swords.) Luffy: Just as expected of you, Zoro! I believed in you! Nahaha!! Zoro: Figures. Now, go! Sommers: HUH?! Who the hell was that?! Luffy: That’s Zoro—my crewmate! You’d better remember him! (Luffy grabs lightning from the sky with his left hand and twists his left arm like a screw, the same pose he uses for his "Rifle" techniques. He forms a circle-crosshair gesture with his right hand and aims at Sommers’ face.) GOMU GOMU NO…! SFX: Crackle! Crackle! (sound of crackling lightning) Sommers: Wha…?! (Luffy lets loose a massive punch coated with lightning and Armament Haki, striking Sommers’ entire body—face and all—brutally electrocuting him and destroying his thorn snakes. His face and body are torn to pieces.) Luffy: DAWN THOR RIFLE!!! (The kanji reads “白い雷回転弾,” literally meaning “White Thunder Rotating Bullet.”) Sommers: BRRRGGGGHAAAAAHHH!!! (The thorns in the body of the children have now come off.) Ylva: Ah! It came off…! Colon: Mother, is that…?! Ripley: I finally saw it at last… Luffy-kun’s white form… He looks like “Nika”… I think of him as… the “Warrior of Liberation”… Sommers: (he's speaking with a bloody mouth. He got completely f*cked up by Luffy’s attack, LOL) NIKGHA BYOU ZEY?! THAD’Z JUZT ZUPERZDIDION BENDT DO BOOL JHILDRED!!! (NIKA, YOU SAY?! THAT'S JUST SUPERSTITION MEANT TO FOOL CHILDREN!) (The children now sees Loki's dragon form clearly.) Child: Ah! It’s Nidhogg!!! Child: Were we saved by that thing?! Loki: Now then… shall we get going?! (Loki stomps on Sommers, LOL) Sommers: GYAAAHHHH!!!! ---------------------------------------- Translated by yours truly: Marco 🍍

misc.text: I am ashamed of my country. What the fuck are y‘all doing??????? (@) 🇮🇱🤝🇩🇪 Deepening Military Ties: Commander of the German Army concludes his visit to Israel The Commander of the German Army, LTG Christian Freuding, concluded a visit to Israel, hosted by MG Nadav Lotan, Commander of the IDF Ground Forces. For the first time, the two signed a formal cooperation agreement, expanding collaboration—a major milestone in the strategic partnership between Israel and Germany. Nami: Thank goodness!!! Giants: Alright!!! (Luffy sees Zoro in the Western Village) Luffy: Ah! That’s Zoro!!! HEEEY!!! Zoro: You guys are late!!! That dragon… don’t tell me… Luffy: Yeah, it’s Loki! Seeing that you’re here, I guess this place is safe! Zoro: Since you’ve become a giant now, go ahead and crush those monsters that came out of dreams! They’re wreaking havoc all over Elbaph right now! Luffy: Got it!!! --- Hm? (Some projectiles came flying towards the injured parents/relatives.) Luffy: Something came flying down! Oimo: It’s “thorns”!!! Get the children inside the buildings! Sommers: It’s no use, you bastards! Road: That guy followed us?! (Sommers appears and is seen riding on three large intertwined thorns which forms into a three headed snake.) Sommers: There’s no way you guys should be alive, you bunch of trash! Give me back my “emotions”!!! Although… this might actually be convenient!! If you brats are still alive, then this isn’t a failure for me!! With these multi-barreled “THORN LAUNCHERS”* (Sommers' three headed thorn snake opens their mouths and reveals cannon-like protrusions.) (TL NOTE: in Japanese, Sommers calls this technique “IBARANCHA”—a combination of ibara meaning “thorn” and rancha, the Japanese pronunciation of “launcher”) Colon: I… won’t let you do that!!! This time, I will protect Mother!!! Child: Me too!! Child: Me too!! (All of the children are now shielding their parents/relatives) Sommers: You’re making me cry!!! This is the best, you guys!!! (the thorn snakes fires a barrage of thorns from their mouths.) Ripley: Run away, Colon, please! Colon: No way! I’ll protect you, Mother! (Zoro comes to the rescue and parries all the thorns with his swords.) Luffy: Just as expected of you, Zoro! I believed in you! Nahaha!! Zoro: Figures. Now, go! Sommers: HUH?! Who the hell was that?! Luffy: That’s Zoro—my crewmate! You’d better remember him! (Luffy grabs lightning from the sky with his left hand and twists his left arm like a screw, the same pose he uses for his "Rifle" techniques. He forms a circle-crosshair gesture with his right hand and aims at Sommers’ face.) GOMU GOMU NO…! SFX: Crackle! Crackle! (sound of crackling lightning) Sommers: Wha…?! (Luffy lets loose a massive punch coated with lightning and Armament Haki, striking Sommers’ entire body—face and all—brutally electrocuting him and destroying his thorn snakes. His face and body are torn to pieces.) Luffy: DAWN THOR RIFLE!!! (The kanji reads “白い雷回転弾,” literally meaning “White Thunder Rotating Bullet.”) Sommers: BRRRGGGGHAAAAAHHH!!! (The thorns in the body of the children have now come off.) Ylva: Ah! It came off…! Colon: Mother, is that…?! Ripley: I finally saw it at last… Luffy-kun’s white form… He looks like “Nika”… I think of him as… the “Warrior of Liberation”… Sommers: (he's speaking with a bloody mouth. He got completely f*cked up by Luffy’s attack, LOL) NIKGHA BYOU ZEY?! THAD’Z JUZT ZUPERZDIDION BENDT DO BOOL JHILDRED!!! (NIKA, YOU SAY?! THAT'S JUST SUPERSTITION MEANT TO FOOL CHILDREN!) (The children now sees Loki's dragon form clearly.) Child: Ah! It’s Nidhogg!!! Child: Were we saved by that thing?! Loki: Now then… shall we get going?! (Loki stomps on Sommers, LOL) Sommers: GYAAAHHHH!!!! ---------------------------------------- Translated by yours truly: Marco 🍍
